claim: The prediction in atom ATOM_T003_S039_PRE_01 ("Well, I think the way I think of these is I think they're two very basic prim...") is the resolution of the blocker in atom ATOM_T005_S033_BLO_01 ("We can't produce random tokens and hope that'll solve the exploration problem...").
